name: kvirtualdesktop-core
absorption_note: Federated crate of phenotype-infra (ADR-049). KVirtualDesktop VM/desktop isolation core — provides the desktop-session substrate that kvirtualdesktop-mcp-server (sibling MCP adapter) and other federation members consume. Local-only, no standalone GitHub target.
rationale: Canonical VM/desktop isolation substrate inside phenotype-infra. Sits next to kvirtual and kvirtualdesktop-mcp-server in the workspace; the federation crate (this entry) is the lib-target surface, while the sibling kvirtual crate holds the higher-level integration and kvirtualdesktop-mcp-server exposes the MCP adapter. Pairs with the federation service via DesktopPort.
note: Federated crate (2026-06-24 registry sync). Tracked at the workspace-crate level so kvirtualdesktop-core resolves independently of its siblings (kvirtual, kvirtualdesktop-mcp-server). All three remain sibling crates inside phenotype-infra; only kvirtualdesktop-core is promoted to the federated_crates list per task 5 scope.
